summary: Admin Login Activity feature fully tested - all backend APIs (22/22 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. Feature includes: login tracking with IP geolocation, risk flag detection (New Country, New Device, Multiple Failed Attempts), 30-day retention, Block IP, Force Logout, CSV export functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend login activity routes properly implemented with rate limiting (60/min for list, 10/min for sensitive actions)
IP geolocation via ip-api.com with 72-hour cache - good implementation
Risk flags detection working: New Country, New Device, Multiple Failed Attempts
Data-testid attributes not added to frontend - recommend adding for better testing
Session ID masking implemented correctly for privacy
seed_data_creation: Login activity automatically created by login attempts during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Login Activity feature is complete and working. Test via /app/admin/login-activity. Backend endpoints all passing. Frontend has stats cards, filters, table with actions (View Details, Block IP, Force Logout), CSV export.

page_navigation.details: Login Activity page loads correctly from Admin Panel button

stats_cards.details: Shows: Total Logins (7d), Successful, Failed, Success Rate, Unique Users, Risky Logins

activity_table.details: Table shows: User, Login Time (IST), Status, IP Address, Location, Device, Auth Method, Risk flags, Actions

search_filter.details: Search by email or name filter working

status_filter.details: Status dropdown with All Status, Success, Failed, Logout options

more_filters.details: More Filters toggle shows: From Date, To Date, Country, IP Address filters

view_details.details: Side panel shows: User Info, Session Details (Status, Auth Method, Session ID masked, Timestamp IST), Location & Network, Device Info

export_csv.details: CSV export downloads file with headers: Timestamp, User Name, Email, Status, Auth Method, IP Address, Country, Region, City, ISP, Device Type, Browser, OS, Risk Flags, Failure Reason

block_ip_modal.details: Modal has IP Address (pre-filled), Reason field, Duration dropdown (1h-30d options), Cancel and Block IP buttons

privacy_notice.details: Footer shows: 'Location data is approximate based on IP address. Data retained for 30 days per privacy policy.'

risk_flags.details: Risk flags displayed correctly (e.g., 'New Device' shown with orange badge)

test_classes: TestLoginActivityList (5 tests) - List, user filter, status filter, country filter, risk filter
TestLoginActivityDetail (2 tests) - Get detail, 404 for non-existent
TestBlockIP (5 tests) - Block, validation, list, unblock, 404 unblock non-existent
TestForceLogout (2 tests) - 404 for non-existent user, validation
TestAuthorizationRequired (6 tests) - All endpoints require admin auth

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/03_login_activity_page.png - Login Activity page with stats and table
.screenshots/05_view_details_panel.png - Side panel with full session details
.screenshots/06_block_ip_modal.png - Block IP modal with form fields
